name: Bug Report
about: Report a crash, incorrect behavior, or unexpected error
labels: bug

**Kaappi version**
<!-- Run: kaappi --version -->

**Platform**
<!-- e.g. macOS aarch64, Linux x86_64 -->

**Build mode**
<!-- ReleaseSafe (default), Debug, or ReleaseFast -->

**Description**
<!-- What happened? What did you expect? -->

**Minimal reproduction**
```scheme
;; Paste the smallest program that triggers the bug
```

**Does it panic or raise a Scheme error?**
<!-- A panic (segfault, unreachable, etc.) is a higher-severity issue than
     a wrong Scheme error. If unsure, paste the full output. -->

```
```
